summary: This ERC proposes a standard interface for advertisement clients to track user actions in contracts and check corresponding rewards from advertisement protocols. Contracts implementing the interface use events to define a region of interest within a transaction. A Dapp could implement this interface to join an advertisement protocol, which enable projects to fund users for specific actions in a contract. While users could benefit from project funds, dapps would also get proportional rewards once they joined the protocol.
title: Advertisement Tracking Interface
